mapper.insert: INSERT INTO voucher_templates ( template_code, template_name, voucher_format, company_id, html_template, css_styles, description, is_active, is_default, version, supported_formats, include_approval, include_logo, page_orientation, paper_size, margin_settings, created_by ) VALUES ( #{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{voucherFormat}, #{companyId}::uuid NULL, #{htmlTemplate}, #{cssStyles}, #{description}, #{isActive}, #{isDefault}, #{version}, #{supportedFormats}::text, #{includeApproval}, #{includeLogo}, #{pageOrientation}, #{paperSize}, #{marginSettings}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE voucher_templates SET template_name = #{templateName}, voucher_format = #{voucherFormat}, html_template = #{htmlTemplate}, css_styles = #{cssStyles}, description = #{description}, supported_formats = #{supportedFormats}::text, include_approval = #{includeApproval}, include_logo = #{includeLogo}, page_orientation = #{pageOrientation}, paper_size = #{paperSize}, margin_settings = #{marginSettings}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT vt.id, vt.template_code, vt.template_name, vt.voucher_format, vt.company_id, vt.html_template, vt.css_styles, vt.description, vt.is_active, vt.is_default, vt.version, vt.supported_formats, vt.include_approval, vt.include_logo, vt.page_orientation, vt.paper_size, vt.margin_settings, vt.created_by, vt.created_at, vt.updated_at FROM voucher_templates vt WHERE vt.id = #{templateId}

SELECT vt.id, vt.template_code, vt.template_name, vt.voucher_format, vt.company_id, vt.html_template, vt.css_styles, vt.description, vt.is_active, vt.is_default, vt.version, vt.supported_formats, vt.include_approval, vt.include_logo, vt.page_orientation, vt.paper_size, vt.margin_settings, vt.created_by, vt.created_at, vt.updated_at FROM voucher_templates vt WHERE vt.template_code = #{templateCode} AND vt.is_active = true
mapper.update:
UPDATE voucher_templates SET is_default = false, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE voucher_format = #{voucherFormat} AND is_default = true
AND company_id = #{companyId}::uuid
AND company_id IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT vt.id as template_id, vt.template_code, vt.template_name, 0 as usage_count FROM voucher_templates vt WHERE vt.is_active = true ORDER BY vt.template_name

SELECT vt.id, vt.template_code, vt.template_name, vt.voucher_format, vt.company_id, vt.html_template, vt.css_styles, vt.description, vt.is_active, vt.is_default, vt.version, vt.supported_formats, vt.include_approval, vt.include_logo, vt.page_orientation, vt.paper_size, vt.margin_settings, vt.created_by, vt.created_at, vt.updated_at FROM voucher_templates vt WHERE vt.is_active = true AND vt.created_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '#{daysSinceLastUsed} days' ORDER BY vt.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO voucher_templates ( template_code, template_name, voucher_format, company_id, html_template, css_styles, description, is_active, is_default, version, supported_formats, include_approval, include_logo, page_orientation, paper_size, margin_settings, created_by ) SELECT #{newTemplateCode}, #{newTemplateName}, voucher_format, company_id, html_template, css_styles, description, true, false, #{newVersion}, supported_formats, include_approval, include_logo, page_orientation, paper_size, margin_settings, #{createdBy} FROM voucher_templates WHERE id = #{sourceTemplateId}
